versions.version_description: It includes how to play the vocal melody for guitar.

tuning: E A D G B E

pro_brother.version_description: This version provides an arrangement for two electric guitars with rhythm and lead. It does not provide acoustic guitar chords. However, the main hook can easily be transposed onto an acoustic(same frets). It also leaves out a few electric filler notes in the chorus. No bass. No drums. No organ. No vocals.

recommended.song_name: Huntin Fishin And Lovin Every Day
Country Girl Shake It For Me
